title: Employers add 172K jobs as US employment market shows resilience
description:
Employers added 172,000 jobs in May – roughly double what forecasters had expected – and the unemployment rate remained at a low 4.3%, the Labor Department reported Friday.

title: New HealthLinc clinic expands access to care in Newton County
description: HealthLinc said the clinic expands access to affordable health care services for residents in the northwest Indiana community. The federally qualified health center provides care regardless of a patient's ability to pay.

title: AI data center boom risks breakup of biggest US power grid operator
description:
Federal officials have suggested breaking up PJM Interconnection, which runs the grid from the Illinois prairie to the Jersey Shore. New data centers are straining electricity supplies across the 13 states PJM serves.
